import { Fork } from "./types"; export default function (fork: Fork): { geq: (than: any) => import("./types").Type<unknown>; defaults: { null: () => null; emptyArray: () => never[]; false: () => boolean; true: () => boolean; undefined: () => void; "use strict": () => string; }; isPrimitive: import("./types").Type<unknown>; }; interface NodeModule { exports: { default?: any; __esModule?: boolean; }; } export declare function maybeSetModuleExports(moduleGetter: () => NodeModule): void; export {};
